line: // Built-in type names recognized by the grammar.
x eq y or x neq y or x lt y or x lt_eq y or
x gt y or x gt_eq y
def classify[x] = if x gt 10 then :large else :small
def logic[x, y] = x and y or not disabled
def consequence[x, y] = x implies y
def arithmetic[x, y] = x + y - 2 * y / 3 % 2
// Quantifiers, membership, selection, and function syntax.
def every_order[id] = forall(o: order_customer(o, id) implies valid(o))
def all_unicode[id] = ∀(o: order_customer(o, id) implies valid(o))
def selected = select x from state where x neq :archived
def iterated = select x from state for x in Symbol
ic no_orphans = forall(o: Order(o) implies exists(c: order_customer(o, c)))
// Pipe-like control tokens supplied by the grammar.
def visible[id] = flags(id, true) and not labels(id, :hidden)
def totals[id, total] = quantities(id, q) and prices(id, p) and total = q * p
def expensive[id] = exists(total: totals(id, total) and total >= 20)
def calendar_units = Day; Week; Month; Year
def temporal[x] = x in calendar_units or x in clock_units
def signed = Int8; Int16; Int32; Int64; Int128
def unsigned = UInt8; UInt16; UInt32; UInt64; UInt128
def numeric[x] = x in signed or x in unsigned or x in floating
def positive[x] = numeric(x) and x gt 0
def terminal[x] = x eq :done or x eq :failed
def neither[x] = not one(x) and not two(x)
def distinct[x, y] = x != y and x ≠ y
def available[id] = customer(id) and not disabled_customer(id)
def joined[id, name] = available(id) and customers.names(id, name)
def filtered[id, name] = joined(id, name) and name neq ""
def projected = select name from filtered where name neq "unknown"
def ordered = select id from available for id in Int64
def all_results = forall(id: available(id) implies customer(id))
def final_check = truth and not lie
def output = final_check and final_symbol and final_text
def output = customers.visible or orders.expensive or closure.output
